parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Beregning af BMI

actor bruger
boundary index.jsp
boundary resultat.jsp

box "BmiUtil"
participant Initializer
end box

box "PresentationLayer"
control FrontController
participant Command
participant Resultat
end box

box "LogicFacade"
participant LogicFacade
end box

box "DBAccess"
participant BmiMapper
end box

database BmiDB

bruger -> index.jsp : 1 start

== Initialization ==

index.jsp -> Initializer : 2 getSportList()
Initializer --> index.jsp : 3 ArrayList<Sport>

== Beregn BMI ==

index.jsp -> FrontController : 4 doPost()
FrontController -> FrontController : 5 processRequest()
FrontController -> Command : 6 from()
Command --> FrontController : 7 Resultat
FrontController -> Resultat : 8 execute()
Resultat -> LogicFacade : 9 insertBmiItem()
LogicFacade -> BmiMapper : 10 insertBmiItem()
BmiMapper -> BmiDB : 11 executeQuery()
BmiDB --> BmiMapper : 12 OK
BmiMapper --> LogicFacade : 13 OK
LogicFacade --> Resultat : 14 OK
Resultat --> FrontController : 15 resultat
FrontController --> resultat.jsp : 16 forward()

@enduml
```
